title: Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the aerial units of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] founded in [[11,000 BBY]]|[[Rocket-jumper|aerial infantry]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Resistance]]}} {{Organization |image=[[File:RocketJumper-GAW.jpg]] |name=Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit |type= |founder= |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations=*[[Monument Plaza/Legends|Monument Plaza]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''[[Galaxy at War]]'' *[[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]], [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]][[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] |formed= |founded=c. [[11,000 BBY]] |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved=[[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] |restored= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Republic Army]] }} {{Quote|from the sands of Socorro to the seas of Seffi|Famous motto of the Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|''[[Galaxy at War]]''}} The '''Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit''' ('''R-EAU'''), known commonly as the '''Republic rocket-jumpers''', was an elite soldier equipped with a [[Rocket pack/Legends|rocket pack]], used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] millennia before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. They were organized as a part of the [[Republic Army]], and before the formal [[Army/Legends|army]] was founded, the unit was one of many decentralized forces that made up the collective [[Republic Army|Republic Armies]]. ==Characteristics== [[File:RocketJumper-TotJC.png|thumb|left|180px|Rocket-jumper]] {{Quote|At 0300 we established an airhead. At 0308 we encountered armed resistance. By the time the rest of the army arrived at 0400, there wasn't any character left for them to fight.|Master Jumper Barkin's journal|}} The rocket jumpers held two primary objectives on the battlefield. The first was to hold the line until reinforcements from the Republic arrived or assistance was received from either heavy artillery or starship. Their second mission directive was to provide limited forms of reconnaissance, as well as conduct rescue and quick response operations.''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' After they developed their reputation as an elite force, the rocket-jumpers began to participate in special ops missions such as VIP extractions as well as the destruction of enemy weapon emplacements. Republic rocket-jumpers were also deployed to break stalemates and sieges by dropping straight into the heavy fighting.''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]'' While these were the normal purposes of the unit, it was known that they were also capable of taking part in large scale engagements where they served as a forward response element. Due to the group being an elite unit, as well as the dangers faced on their missions, only the most skilled of combat officers and soldiers were allowed to join them. Out of those that joined, only 8% of candidates managed to receive a rocket-jumper billet. Those soldiers part of the unit were infamous for their bizarre behavior when not on duty hours, with it being noted that they engaged in drinking, fighting, and a number of stunts. It was known that most patrons avoided locales where rocket-jumpers congregated and such locations were the most difficult to insure in [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]]. Despite all this, they were dedicated soldiers while on a mission and maintained that discipline on the field. They were expected to succeed on the battlefield, or die trying. Due to their high level of discipline, they refused to fail or surrender under any circumstances, putting their mission objectives before anything and everything else. This meant that only the most qualified as well as dedicated of troopers were allowed to serve the Republic in the role of rocket-jumpers. They were equipped with a [[Zim Systems]] [[ROCKET]] personal rocket pack, armor, [[Nitrocellulose Incendiary Device 0033X|0033X grenades]], and a [[pulse-wave rifle]]. ==History== {{Quote|OK boys, we're only two miles above the city.''"
"''Two miles, is that all? Damn. One time on Cyborrea, we had to drop from sixteen miles up! No air, full space gear…''"
'''Save the bragging for after the battle. Recon reports heavy door-to-door fighting between the Beast Riders on the one side and dark-side army on the other. We're dropping down into the middle of it. So strap on your packs, jack up your blasters and get ready to jump!''"
"''Ready!''"
"''Launch door open…''"
"''Right!''"
"''And…launch!''"
"''Yeah!|Republic rocket-jumpers deploy over [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]]|audio=RocketJumpersTotJ.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]}} [[File:JumpinRockets.jpg||thumb|right|130px|[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] rocket-jumpers drop down over [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] during the [[Second Battle of Onderon]].]] The unit was initially formed in the year [[11,000 BBY]] when a reliable form of jet-propelled packs was developed. During the [[Seventh Alsakan Conflict|Pius Dea Civil War]], which ended [[Pius Dea]] domination over the Galactic Republic, rocket jumpers played an important role in the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] victory over Pius Dea forces on [[Carida/Legends|Ord Carida]].{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-4-the-rise-of-the-republic-needs-author-entry|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 4: The Rise of the Republic}} Since that time, they participated in major battles which included the [[Second Herglic Feud]], the [[Waymancy Storm]], the [[Gank Massacres]] and the [[Quesaya Border Conflict]]. [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Netus]] served with them prior to his service as [[Minister of Defense (Republic)|Minister of Defense]]. During the [[Great Droid Revolution]], they were defeated by [[Juggernaut war droid]]s in a battle over [[Monument Plaza/Legends|Monument Plaza]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Ironically, the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] had been originally commissioned by decorated rocket-jumper veteran [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Vocatara]] during the Gank Massacres. Following a call for Republic aid from [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] during the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], they deployed from [[Republic troop carrier|rocket-jumper troopships]] in the skies of the capital city of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]]. Supporting the [[Beast Riders]] of Onderon in [[Second Battle of Onderon|battle]] against [[Naddist]] forces, the rocket-jumpers descended through hostile artillery fire to engage the ground-based enemy. They were ultimately disbanded in the year [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] which saw the Republic Army vanish and be replaced by the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]]. While they no longer operated, the tactics of the group continued to live on. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the newly formed [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] made use of [[Clone jet trooper/Legends|clone jet troopers]] that employed the same lightning tactics as the old rocket-jumper divisions. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] also continued the practice by commissioning [[Jumptrooper/Legends|Airtrooper]] military units. In this later era, the Republic rocket-jumpers were one of a number of special forces noted in the history of the galaxy, where they stood alongside such units as the [[Freedom Warriors]] and [[Atrisian Assault Corps]]. ===Legacy=== Centuries later, by the time of the Galactic Empire, the stormtrooper [[TX-5532]] cited the Rocket-Jumper Elite Advanced Unit as being the closest equivalent corps of elite, first-attack soldiers to the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]].''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'' During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a group of [[Jump pirates|pirates]] used antique rocket packs from Old Republic rocket-jumpers to assault [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] as they passed through the topcloud layers of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]'s [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]].{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Suspected Jump Pirate Lair}} on Corellia ==Appearances== Republic}} *''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Saltacohetes de la República }} [[Category:Galactic Republic soldiers]]
